nasb.text: These then are the records of the generations of Esau the father of the Edomites in the hill country of Seir.

esv.text: These are the generations of Esau the father of the Edomites in the hill country of Seir.

cnv.text: 以下是西珥山以東人的始祖以掃的後代：

ccb.text: 以扫是西珥山区以东人的祖先，以下是他的子孙。

csbs.text: 以下是西珥山以东人始祖以扫的谱系。
